description: Initialize packages/web with Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript. Configure tsconfig paths for @loopcommons/llm import.
result: Next.js 16.1.6 + Tailwind v4.2 + TypeScript strict. npm workspaces for @loopcommons/llm resolution. Turbopack + webpack both work.

description: Verify latest Next.js App Router SSE streaming patterns, Tailwind v4 setup for Next.js, and confirm correct approach for server-sent events from Route Handlers.
result: Next.js 16 uses Turbopack by default. SSE via TransformStream+writer in Route Handler. Tailwind v4: CSS-native @import, @theme for design tokens. SSE client: fetch+ReadableStream reader (not EventSource for POST).

description: Create design tokens (CSS variables), Tailwind config for dark theme, global styles, and layout shell with app/layout.tsx.
result: globals.css with @theme block for dark theme tokens. layout.tsx with dark class, bg-bg, text-text, font-mono.

description: Implement POST /api/chat route handler: parse messages from request body, call agent() server-side, stream TraceEvents as SSE back to client. Define ChatSSEEvent union type in lib/types.ts.
result: route.ts with input validation (max 50 messages, 10k chars each), TransformStream SSE streaming, TraceCollector forwarding events. types.ts with ChatSSEEvent + ChatMessage.

description: Build Layout.tsx: two-panel responsive layout with collapsible right sidebar for trace inspector, header bar for cost dashboard slot.
result: Layout.tsx with header/main/sidebar slots, collapsible sidebar toggle, border styling.

description: Implement useChat custom hook: POST to /api/chat, consume SSE stream, parse ChatSSEEvent, manage messages/trace/loading/error state. Also create lib/format.ts with formatCost and formatTokens helpers.
result: use-chat.ts with full SSE parsing, abort support. format.ts with formatCost, formatTokens, formatLatency — all hardened against NaN/undefined/negative inputs.

description: Build ChatInput.tsx: auto-resizing textarea, send button, stop button (visible during loading), keyboard shortcut Enter to send / Shift+Enter for newline.
result: ChatInput.tsx with auto-resize, Enter/Shift+Enter, Send/Stop buttons.

description: Build ChatThread.tsx: scrollable message list with auto-scroll to bottom, empty state placeholder. Build MessageBubble.tsx: user/assistant message rendering with markdown-like formatting and per-message cost badge.
result: ChatThread.tsx with auto-scroll, empty state. MessageBubble.tsx with user/assistant bubbles, cost badge.

description: Build ToolCallInline.tsx: collapsible inline display of tool calls within assistant messages showing tool name, input (formatted JSON), output, latency, and error state.
result: ToolCallInline.tsx with collapsible detail, JSON input, output, latency, error styling.

description: Build TraceInspector.tsx: sidebar panel showing rounds list with per-round tokens, latency, cost, finish reason. Expandable round detail showing request/response.
result: TraceInspector.tsx with summary stats, expandable RoundDetail, token/cost/latency display.

description: Build TraceTimeline.tsx: horizontal stacked bar chart showing round durations and tool execution durations within each round. Pure CSS/SVG, no chart library.
result: TraceTimeline.tsx with CSS-based horizontal bars for rounds and tool executions.

description: Build CostDashboard.tsx: header cost/token totals with popover breakdown.
result: CostDashboard.tsx with cumulative totals, click-to-open popover with per-message breakdown.

description: Enhance TraceInspector with live updating during streaming (rounds appear as they complete), status indicator, and trace timeline integration.
result: TraceInspector accepts liveRounds prop and shows running/completed/error status badges. Timeline integrated.

description: Wire everything together in app/page.tsx: useChat hook, Layout with ChatThread+ChatInput in main panel, TraceInspector in sidebar, CostDashboard in header, ToolCallInline in messages.
result: page.tsx wires all components. Build passes. Dev server starts.

description: Start dev server, use agent-browser to verify page loads at localhost:3000, chat input exists, empty state visible. Capture baseline screenshot.
result: Page loads with dark theme. All elements present. Sidebar toggles correctly. Baseline screenshots captured.

description: Red-team: test API route with malicious input (XSS payloads, missing fields, oversized messages). Verify input validation and error handling.
result: All 9 test cases pass. Empty/missing/invalid inputs return 400 with clear error messages. XSS content correctly accepted (200). Oversized and over-limit properly rejected.

description: Red-team: verify cost calculations match expected values for known token counts. Test edge cases: zero tokens, very large values, missing usage data.
result: Cost formula verified. Fixed NaN propagation in clampUsage (llm package). Fixed formatCost/formatTokens/formatLatency edge cases. cachedTokens discount noted as future improvement.

description: E2E: send a message and verify assistant responds, cost badge appears, trace sidebar shows round data.
result: Sent 'What is 2+2?' — got '2+2 = 4'. Cost badge $0.000089, trace shows R0 with 649ms latency, 34 input/11 output tokens. All verified via agent-browser.

description: E2E: verify trace inspector shows rounds, latency, tokens, cost. Verify timeline visualization renders. Verify tool calls render inline.
result: Trace inspector shows completed status, rounds with expandable detail (finish reason, response content), timeline bar chart renders. Tool calls not tested (no tools configured) but component verified via build.

description: E2E: verify cost dashboard accumulates across multiple messages. Capture final visual regression baselines.
result: Sent second message. Cost accumulated: 107 tok $0.000167. Popover shows per-message breakdown (Message 1: 45/$0.000089, Message 2: 62/$0.000078, Total: 107/$0.000167). All baselines captured in e2e-baselines/.
